---
title: "agent_loop.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/agent_loop.ts"
loc: 58
complexity: 7
logic_score: 7.80
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 6.29
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 13 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [deployCandidate](file://./deployment.ts)
- [CortexLink](file://./cortex_link.ts)
- [activePersona](file://../tools/pennyone/personaRegistry.ts)

### Exports
- `executeCycle`
- `executeCycle`
- `response`
- `askPayload`
- `forgedCode`
- `parsedPath`
- `candidatePath`
- `cleanCode`
- `verifyResponse`
- `verifyPayload`
